name: A. Libental Holdings Ltd.
summary: A. Libental Holdings Ltd. develops, constructs, markets, and sells real estate properties in Israel. It develops residential, office, and industrial buildings; educational institutions; and residential neighborhoods. The company was formerly known as Lumir Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to A. Libental Holdings Ltd. in November 2007. A. Libental Holdings Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
